About

Your Future. Your Legacy.
My Purpose.

Rick Peck is a strategist committed to designing systems that protect what you've built and fortify what comes next. He works with clients and advisors to architect structures built to stand the test of time.

A graduate of the University of Illinois College of Law, he began his career advising on complex international tax matters at two of the world's largest professional services firms. He later served as Senior Advisor at a Beverly Hills–based multi-family office specializing in athletes and entertainers.

Today, he advises a select group of high-capacity individuals — from corporate professionals and entrepreneurs to professional athletes, Wall Street executives, and Hollywood creatives. Each engagement is supported by a trusted bench of legal, tax, and accounting professionals, as needed.

He remains intentionally selective. His practice is referral-based, and depth will always outweigh volume.
